title: Popol Vuh: The Hero Twins in Xibalba
description: Hunahpu and Xbalanque descend to the underworld, outwit the lords of death, and become the sun and moon.
introduction: Hunahpu and Xbalanque descend to the underworld, outwit the lords of death, and become the sun and moon.

translation.original_text: Xib'alb'a, the Place of Fright, where the Lords of Death held sway.
